The characters that I own.
Apologies for the big open question.. just kinda unsure how to move forward.
First of all, congrats for the roster you built up in 9 days! It's impressive!

Regarding your 2 teams, the Ghelot one seems good apart 2 things... Life Drain cov Is team unique, so avoid to use it on 2 Awakeners, and try to build up just 1 VERY powerful set, and find space for the new SSR Wheel on a support
The tea time one
yep EOS

Second team I would remove Thais and Horla... You need them with Ghelot and for this reason (Dzone wise) you cannot use them in 2 comps. I would try Winkle in team 2. She helps a lot as aliemus battery for Arachne

triggers an effect after meeting criteria of another card, so for her, in ultra or annihilation round (after exalted), she will do a pursuit after another character uses any card and use 1 of 5 threads where she puts a bunch of her counters on an enemy.  each time you do it, it gets bigger from the wheels/exalt, and by the 5th+ you can take huge chunks of boss hp off
Ok i see but it's so hard to get her need like 90 pulls for one copy
Hoard and wait
You can also use the Horizon
I suggest you to always buy it from the shop

## Wanda
- **Exalt "Necropolis of Dreams"**: Counter gained is increased by 50%.
- **Command Card "Keeper of the Lost"**: Counter gained directly is increased by 20%; Counter gained via "Leap" is increased by 33%.
- **Command Card "Spine Needle Chains"**: Base DMG increased by 40%.
- **Enlighten 1 "The Revelation"**: The Counter gained directly by "Keeper of the Lost" is increased by 20%; the Counter gained via "Dreamlure" is increased by 20%.
## Horla
- **Command Card "Dirge Psalm"**: Strength gained directly and Strength gained via "Metaphor" are increased by 33%.
## Castor
- **Talent "Cleansing Feathers"**: The effect is adjusted to: the first time each turn that "Onyx Plume" is played, apply "Corrosion" to all enemies.
- **Rouse "Skybound Oath"**: The "Corrosion" applied by playing "Onyx Plume" is increased by 14%.
- **Over-Exaltation "Over the Sea of Thorns"**: The "Corrosion" applied by playing "Onyx Plume" is increased by 14%.
- **Absolute Axiom "Nox Diouskouron"**: Due to the adjustment of "Cleansing Feathers", the effect is changed to: apply one additional instance of Talent "Cleansing Feathers"' "Corrosion" to front-row enemies; when both exist, the overall effect is unchanged.
## Pollux
- **Rouse "Path of Ablution"**: New effect — "Sacred Heart" inflicts an additional Bleed equal to 100% of the damage dealt.
- **Absolute Axiom "Lux Diouskouron"**: Due to the adjustment of "Path of Ablution", the base effect of "Sacred Heart" inflicting Bleed equal to 100% of the damage is removed; when both exist, the overall effect is unchanged.

embeds.title: Arachne Kit and Singularity Ultra brief explanation
embeds.description: Hi , rain from discord here. There is alot going on with the newest awakener Arachne, and I think alot of players are confused…

content: She's usable, but to carry A5 she needs OE
i feel like my brain wont comprehend so ill go look for video
or sum
Do you know how to play regular ultra teams?
my brain too dum dum

Archane is one of the most mechanically complex unit, probably.
She can produce decent shields, but that's not why you play her... more like an extra bonus.

Arachne main trick is "Final Verdict", a special debuff that provoke an instant death to anything that has remaining hp less than the total amount of debuff. The strong point of this thing is it ignore almost any form of protection... you can kill things with Arachne when the are supposed to be invincible for the round.

Aside that, triggering her abilities, she passively improved most other command cards of its allies, making her an amazing support.

How do does that? Meh... I'm too lazy to explain it all, better let you read some guides
Learn how to play regular ultra* teams then, arachne is not too big of a step up after you learn those
